description_long: This is a tall, upright arcade game cabinet themed after the 'Aliens: Extermination' franchise, featuring a prominent illuminated marquee at the top with the word 'ALIENS' and a stylized alien head. The front of the cabinet has a large, flat display screen showing vivid game graphics, flanked by two mounted light gun controllers—one red and one blue—indicating two-player capability. The control panel below the screen is equipped with additional buttons and a start panel, and the base is sturdy with a wide footprint for stability. The side panels are decorated with detailed, high-contrast artwork depicting alien creatures and the game's title, using a palette of black, green, and blue. The rear of the cabinet is plain, with visible access panels and green accent lines outlining the structure. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or MDF with plastic and metal components, and the surface is glossy and smooth.
description: A tall, illuminated 'Aliens: Extermination' arcade cabinet with a large screen, dual light gun controllers, and vibrant alien-themed side artwork. The cabinet features a glossy black finish with green accents and a prominent marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large screen, dual light gun controllers, control panel, and the illuminated 'ALIENS' marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the detailed alien-themed side artwork and the protruding gun controllers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back panel with green trim and an access panel, no visible controls or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side artwork and the mounted gun controllers.
attribute_screen_type: Flat LCD display, large size, with a visible bezel and vibrant graphics.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two mounted light gun controllers (red and blue) for two players, with additional buttons and a central start panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'ALIENS' in large, glowing letters with a stylized alien head above, using green and blue hues for a sci-fi theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Detailed, high-contrast artwork depicting alien creatures and the 'ALIENS EXTERMINATION' title, with a black background and green/blue highlights.
